Document:
# Path of Cosmos
Difficulty: [color=red]Hard[/color]
The Path of Cosmos revolves around area denial, teleportation, and mastery over space. Pick this path if you enjoy adapting to your environment and thinking outside (or inside) the box.
## Pros
- Control the movement of foes with cosmic fields. - Teleport rapidly across the station. - Confound opponents with barriers upon barriers.
## Cons
- Requires you spread your star mark to affect opponents with your cosmic fields. - Relatively low damage. - Relatively low direct defense, highly reliant on proper use of abilities.
## Knowledge
Knowledge Name Ingredients/Type Description
Eternal Gate Knife, Glass sheet Creates a cosmic blade.
Grasp of Cosmos Passive Ability Your grasp will give a star mark and create a cosmic field where you stand. Cosmic fields prevent starmarked from crossing.
Mark of Cosmos Passive Ability Your grasp will now apply the comsic mark, teleporting them to the location the mark was placed when activated, and stunning them.
Cosmic Rune Active Ability Creates two cosmic runes, allowing heretics to teleport between them and cursing heathens with a starmark.
Star Blast Active Ability Fires a slow projectile that raises cosmic fields where it goes, if recasted, teleports you to the orb and generates cosmic fields.
Star Touch Active Ability Starmarks and links you to the victim, blinding them and allowing you to stab them at range, puts them to sleep if the link is unbroken.
Cosmic Blade Passive Ability Your blade now starmarks victims and hits star marked people at higher range. You can perform combos by chaining your attacks between multiple people and dealing heavy damage.
Cosmic Expansion Active Ability Creates a 5x5 cosmic field and starmarks nearby heathens.
Creator's Gift Three starmarked corpses Summons a powerful Star Gazer loyal to you. Gives you full pressure and temperature immunity as well as x-ray vision.
## Armor and Passive Ability
Name Effect
T1 Passive Cosmic fields speed you up and regenerate your stamina, and
Starwoven Cloak Immunity to space hazards as well as free movement in no-grav environment.
T2 Passive Your cosmic fields defuse bombs.
T3 Passive Your cosmic fields slow projectiles down.
## Tips
- Your Mansus Grasp will mark your opponent with a star mark, as well as leave a mark that, when detonated, will teleport your opponent back to the place where the mark was applied and briefly paralyze them. - Your cosmic runes can quickly teleport you from two different locations instantly. Beware, however; non-heretics are also able to travel through them. Be creative and have your opponents teleport right into a trap. They come out star marked! - When standing on top of a cosmic rune, you can click on yourself with a empty hand to activate it. - Star marked opponents cannot cross your cosmic fields willingly. But they can be dragged through! - Star Blast is both a jaunt ability as well as a disabling tool. Use it to catch several people in your cosmic fields at once. - Star Touch will prevent your target from teleporting away. Should they fail to break the tether, they will be put to sleep and then teleport to your feet. - It's Always a good idea to leave one cosmic rune near your ritual rune, it will allow you to quickly kidnap your targets to sacrifice them.
